title: GROUP BY causes unexpected conversion
description:
mrigger added on 2020-03-10 09:33:33:
Consider the following test case:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 REAL, c1 REAL GENERATED ALWAYS AS (c0));
INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES (1);
SELECT * FROM t0 GROUP BY c0; -- expected: 1.0|1.0, actual: 1.0|1
SELECT * FROM t0; -- 1.0|1.0
I would expect the same result for the first and second query; however, the first one unexpectedly converts the value stored in column c1.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b INT AS (a + 1));
SELECT * FROM t1 GROUP BY a;
key_bug_features: GROUP BY unexpectedly converts generated column values
